title: Cobblemon GUI KDS
description:
It is a pack of resources that changes the GUI texture: Battle, Common, Interact, Party, Pasture, PC, StarterSelection, Summary, Trade, Categories, Types and Small Types for cobblemon.

É um pacote de recursos que altera a textura da GUI.
body:
### ## **what this resource pack is for?**

### English
this resource pack is for cobblemon mod
it changes the mod's original GUI textures to the texture that I edited with love for the mod and the community.

### Portuguese
este pacote de recurso é para o mod do cobblemon
ele muda as texturas originais de GUI do mod para a textura que eu editei com amor ao mod e a comunidade.

what has changed?

Battle GUI
Pc GUI
Summary GUI
and others icons...
